channel.title: Ora Browser Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.description:
Highlights

  • Redesigned Settings with a sidebar for quicker navigation between sections. (by @yonaries in #225)
  • Refined password UI layout and styles for clarity. (by @yonaries in #228)

Improvements

  • Updated window traffic lights and the sidebar toggle icon for a cleaner, more consistent look on macOS. (by @atpugvaraa in #224)
  • Restored Cmd+Z to use native macOS Undo. (by @enzocarpentier in #227)
  • Updated project license to GPL-3.0. (by @yonaries in #223)

Full Changelog

Ora 0.2.13

Highlights

  • New Settings experience with sidebar navigation and a cleaner Passwords screen — easier to find and manage options. (by @yonaries in #225, #228)

Improvements

  • Polished window controls and the sidebar toggle icon on macOS. (by @atpugvaraa in #224)
  • Restored native Cmd+Z undo on macOS. (by @enzocarpentier in #227)

Full Changelog

item.title: Version 0.2.12
item.description:
Ora Browser v0.2.12

Changes since last release:

Features

  • feat: password manager and autofill with keychains (#217) — Yonathan Dejene
  • feat: add InjectionIII hot reloading support for debug builds (#212) — Yonathan Dejene
  • feat: pass `tabManager` environment object to container dialogs and the new container button. (#211) — Yonathan Dejene
  • feat(dialogs): add quit confirmation dialog triggered on Cmd+Q — yonaries
  • feat: add dialogs for create, edit and delete containers — yonaries
  • feat: custom shape icons — yonaries
  • feat: dialog ui and manager — yonaries
  • feat(ui): add OraButton and OraInput component with variants and sizes — yonaries

Docs

  • docs: fix vercel oss badge — yonaries
  • docs: reduce logo size — yonaries
  • docs: fix badges — yonaries
  • docs: format readiness notice as note — yonaries
  • docs: restore vercel badge — yonaries
  • docs: compact README — yonaries

Chores

  • chore: remove wiki submodule — yonaries
  • chore: replace githooks with lefthook — yonaries
  • chore: clean up githooks — yonaries
  • chore: remove unused scripts (check-security, setup-sparkle) — yonaries
  • chore: clean up scripts — yonaries
  • chore: remove trailing space in KeyModifierListener.swift — yonaries
  • chore: format — yonaries
  • chore: Update minimum system version to 15.0 in Info.plist and project.yml. — yonaries
  • chore: add colored ora logo asset — yonaries

Other

  • refactor: reorganize app source tree (#216) — Yonathan Dejene
  • Use latest stable Xcode in CI build workflow — yonaries
  • Use Xcode 15.4 in CI for FaviconFinder 5.1.5 — yonaries
  • Pin FaviconFinder to 5.0.4 for Xcode 15 CI — yonaries
  • Use FaviconFinder for favicon retrieval — yonaries
